DCB BANK
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT
1. The date format used across the statement is Date-Month-Year.
2. Bank deposits upto INR 5,00,000 per depositor, are covered under the deposit insurance scheme
offered by the Deposit Insurance & Credit Guarantee Corporation of India (DICGC), subject to applicable
terms and conditions.
3. Memorise the ATM PIN. Never write the PIN on the Card!
4. We request you to highlight any discrepancy in the document, either from your registered email ID
addressed to customercare@dcbbank.com or a duly signed letter submitted at the DCB Bank branch
within 30 days of receipt of this document, failing which the contents of this document shall be deemed to
be correct and accepted by you.
5. Please transact in your accounts regularly. Kindly note that, when there are no customer initiated
transactions in the account for a continuous duration of 24 months, the account status becomes
‘Inoperative (dormant)’ and can be activated only after providing valid KYC documentation.
6. Customers may opt to nominate up to four individuals in their accounts. This facility is available only
for accounts held by individuals and sole proprietorship concerns. Customers are encouraged to use the
nomination facility. Nomination form is available at the branch and the Bank’s website
https://www.dcb.bank.in.
DCB Bank Limited
Registered Office:6th Floor,Tower A, Peninsula Business Park, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai-400013 CIN:L99999MH1995PLC089008
